name: Oreo Cookie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush all of the Oreos. A food processor works well, but I prefer using my fingers to crush them.
2. Set aside 1/4 cup of crushed Oreos for garnish.
3. Mix the remaining crumbs with melted margarine until combined.
4. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
5. Blend the cream cheese and powdered sugar together using a mixer until smooth. Fold in half a cup of Cool Whip to create a creamy mixture.
6. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the crushed Oreo crust.
7. Refrigerate for 30 minutes to set.
8. In a separate bowl, mix the instant chocolate pudding mix and milk until well combined.
9. Pour the pudding mixture evenly over the cooled cream cheese layer.
10. Refrigerate for an additional hour to allow the pudding to set.
11. Spread the remaining Cool Whip on top of the pudding layer.
12. Sprinkle the reserved crushed Oreos over the top.
13. Chill the cake in the refrigerator for another hour before serving.
Enjoy your delicious Oreo Cookie Cake!
